data.body: VERIFIED. Change 536 merged as 343c8dd2a. Post-merge optionality.yml run 29163591406 (push lane → reusable _optionality.yml via branch-head): ALL 8 jobs green, named 'optionality / clean core wheel …' etc. — confirming the workflow_call refactor works AND that reusable-workflow child jobs surface as distinct run jobs (which is exactly what im-open/workflow-conclusion reads to fold into the Verified vote). The new gerrit-verify optionality job is now on main; because gerrit-verify runs from main's version under workflow_dispatch, it activates on the NEXT change's Verified run — its first live exercise. Wiring is locked by test_optionality_contract_gates_the_verified_path (green on merged main).
